sglang.title: [BUG] fix moe benchmark when bs*seq is small
sglang.author: yiakwy-xpu-ml-framework-team
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

In "benchmark_deepseekv3_moe_align_blocks.py" change block_size 3 and run calculate_diff(batch_size=1, seq_len=4). The test will fail.
This is because expert_ids for cuda is not zero initialized and contain junk data.
Modifications

After fix, the script can run smoothly for

calculate_d

Ensured backward compatibility with existing config

vllm.title: [V1] Logprobs and prompt logprobs support
vllm.author: afeldman-nm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is adding support for sample logprobs & prompt logprobs to vLLM v1.
New behavior:

During model execution, model runner computes sample logprobs (if user-provided logprobs setting is not None) and prompt logprobs (if user-provided prompt_logprobs setting is not None). For both sample and pro

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix disagg hang caused by the prefill and decode communication issues
vllm.author: houseroad
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Now prefill acts as a server to wait for decode kv request. But when the kv is not ready, prefill return None and decode can proceed. This caused prefill kv buffer accumulate and block other prefill from moving forward. Fix by poll wait + relinquish to ensure kv ready and send the correct kv to deco

vllm.title: [V1] Move KV block hashes from Request to KVCacheManager
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR moves the kv_block_hashes attribute of Request to KVCacheManager.
As the attribute is only used by the KV cache manager (as an optimization), I feel it's more natural to manage it in the KV cache manager. This also helps simplify the Request class.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix multi-round chat error when mistral tokenizer is used
vllm.author: zifeitong
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
mistral-common requires AssistantMessage content to be string, which is different from OpenAI.
As a result, valid OpenAI multi-round chat messages can trigger error like the following when mistral tokenizer is used:
2025-02-06 15:21:19.903	INFO:     10.92.12.39:57034 - "POST /v1/chat/completions HTT
